name: Chocolate Crunch Brownies
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together the softened butter and sugar until light and fluffy.
2. Add eggs to the mixture and stir well.
3. Mix in baking cocoa, flour, vanilla extract, and salt.
4. Spread the batter evenly into a greased 13-inch x 9-inch x 2-inch baking pan.
5. Bake at 350°F for 25 minutes or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
6. Allow the brownies to cool completely.
7. Spread marshmallow creme over the cooled brownies.
8. In a small saucepan, melt peanut butter and chocolate chips together over low heat, stirring constantly.
9. Remove from the heat and stir in the crisp rice cereal.
10. Spread the melted mixture evenly over the marshmallow layer.
11. Allow the mixture to cool completely before cutting into squares.
12. Store leftovers in the refrigerator.
